# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity. Grant the identity broad permissions to access Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Use built-in roles with wildcards for flexibility as we add features. This is for our serverless microservices architecture.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

$schema: "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#"
contentVersion: "1.0.0.0"
resources:
  - type: "Microsoft.Resources/resourceGroups"
    apiVersion: "2021-04-01"
    name: "[parameters('resourceGroupName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    resources:
      - type: "Microsoft.Web/sites"
        apiVersion: "2021-02-01"
        name: "[parameters('functionAppName')]"
        location: "[parameters('location')]"
        kind: "functionapp"
        properties:
          serverFarmId: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', parameters('appServicePlanName'))]"
          identity:
            type: "SystemAssigned"
          siteConfig:
            appSettings:
              - name: "AzureWebJobsStorage"
                value: "[parameters('storageConnectionString')]"
              - name: "FUNCTIONS_WORKER_RUNTIME"
                value: "dotnet"
      - type: "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments"
        apiVersion: "2020-04-01"
        name: "[guid(parameters('functionAppName'), 'StorageRoleAssignment')]"
        properties:
          principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2021-02-01').identity.principalId]"
          roleDefinitionId: "[concat('/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/', parameters('storageRoleDefinitionId'))]"
          scope: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
      - type: "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments"
        apiVersion: "2020-04-01"
        name: "[guid(parameters('functionAppName'), 'KeyVaultRoleAssignment')]"
        properties:
          principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2021-02-01').identity.principalId]"
          roleDefinitionId: "[concat('/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/', parameters('keyVaultRoleDefinitionId'))]"
          scope: "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))]"
      - type: "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments"
        apiVersion: "2020-04-01"
        name: "[guid(parameters('functionAppName'), 'SqlRoleAssignment')]"
        properties:
          principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2021-02-01').identity.principalId]"
          roleDefinitionId: "[concat('/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/', parameters('sqlRoleDefinitionId'))]"
          scope: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases', parameters('sqlServerName'), parameters('sqlDatabaseName'))]"
      - type: "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments"
        apiVersion: "2020-04-01"
        name: "[guid(parameters('functionAppName'), 'CosmosDbRoleAssignment')]"
        properties:
          principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2021-02-01').identity.principalId]"
          roleDefinitionId: "[concat('/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/', parameters('cosmosDbRoleDefinitionId'))]"
          scope: "[resourceId('Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts', parameters('cosmosDbAccountName'))]"

parameters:
  resourceGroupName:
    type: string
  location:
    type: string
  functionAppName:
    type: string
  appServicePlanName:
    type: string
  storageConnectionString:
    type: string
  storageAccountName:
    type: string
  storageRoleDefinitionId:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "acdd72a3-3385-48ef-bd3d-5b0e3c0c0c0c" # Storage Blob Data Contributor
  keyVaultName:
    type: string
  keyVaultRoleDefinitionId:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "b8b1c1c1-1c1c-4c1c-8c1c-1c1c1c1c1c1c" # Key Vault Secrets User
  sqlServerName:
    type: string
  sqlDatabaseName:
    type: string
  sqlRoleDefinitionId:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "b1b1b1b1-1b1b-4b1b-8b1b-1b1b1b1b1b1" # SQL Database Contributor
  cosmosDbAccountName:
    type: string
  cosmosDbRoleDefinitionId:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "b2b2b2b2-2b2b-4b2b-8b2b-2b2b2b2b2b2" # Cosmos DB Account Reader Role
